prose:
Method–provenance block (fukui-reactivity indices, furan)

• Property: condensed Fukui functions f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, and dual descriptor per atom; headline number reported here is the largest electrophilic index f⁺.
• Level of theory: DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier `standard`), no density fitting (exact four-center integrals) in PySCF.
• Geometry provenance: user-supplied Cartesian coordinates (`furan.xyz`); single-point charge analyses only, no re-optimization (DFT//input-XYZ).
• Solvent / environment: gas phase (no implicit solvent).
• Charge & multiplicity: neutral singlet parent (charge 0, mult 1); cation (N–1) state charge +1, doublet; anion (N+1) state charge –1, doublet.
• Software: chemkit `fukui-reactivity` skill (engine subcommand `fukui` → PySCF backend). Live `.out` log was streamed to a file in the working directory at launch; result JSON saved at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmpk6t0rj7m/live.json`.
• Convergence & caveats: integrity.status = "ok", trustworthy = true. All warnings returned by the engine are reproduced verbatim below.
